events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the honeycomb is attributed to missed/inadequate internal vibration during placement (per ACI 304 consolidation guidance), classified as a **fail** with **high risk** since it's in-service and may expose reinforcement to corrosion — requiring sounding/mapping of the defect, removal of unsound concrete, engineer review if structural, and repair per ACI 301 §5.3.6.
